title: Ultimate Optimized for Potato PC's
description: In the next update, I will include a feature that allows you to update your mods in-game.
body:
🚀 **Ultimate Performance & Graphics**

This modpack is designed to make Minecraft run as smoothly as possible without sacrificing the classic gameplay feel. It combines the best optimization mods from the community for maximum FPS and modern graphics features.

✨ **Key Features**

⚡ **Maximum FPS:** By combining Sodium, Lithium, and ImmediatelyFast, the engine is fundamentally improved to minimize stuttering and drastically increase the frame rate.

🎨 **Shader Support:** Thanks to Iris Shaders, you can use beautiful shader packs without sacrificing the performance of OptiFine.

🛠️ **Advanced Settings:** Sodium Extra adds numerous features to the graphics menu, such as detailed particle and animation settings, which are missing in the standard Sodium.


📉 **Intelligent Rendering:** Entity culling prevents objects and creatures you can't see (e.g., behind walls) from being rendered – saving a significant amount of processing power.

🔋 **Efficiency:** Dynamic FPS ensures stable frame rates and reduces system load (e.g., when the game is running in the background), keeping your PC cool and the game running smoothly.
